## Scene or Asset Area

Name the scene, Prefab, or asset group.

## Task Goal

Describe the intended change.

## Ownership Window

When do you expect to edit this scene or asset? Use this to avoid merge conflicts.

## Files Likely to Change

- `.unity`:
- `.prefab`:
- `.asset`:
- other:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The scene opens without missing scripts or missing Prefabs
- [ ] The changed interaction works in Play Mode
- [ ] The PR clearly lists scene, Prefab, or `ProjectSettings/` changes
